app.title: Mahjong Soul Paipu Downloader
app.subtitle: Collect IDs → download logs → convert to MJAI, all in one place
settings.title: Settings
settings.ms_username.label: Account
settings.ms_username.hint: Email or username for the Mahjong Soul CN server
settings.ms_password.label: Password
settings.ms_password.hint: Stored only in local config.env, never uploaded
settings.res_version.label: Resource version (advanced)
settings.res_version.hint: Only needed if login returns error 151; leave blank otherwise
settings.collect_timing.label: Collect thinking time
settings.collect_timing.hint: Add per-move thinking ms (think_ms) into MJAI
settings.save_debug.label: Debug mode
settings.save_debug.hint: Also save timing maps and raw actions for debugging
settings.save_raw_json.label: Save raw JSON
settings.save_raw_json.hint: Save raw game records; enabling this forces thinking-time collection
settings.download_concurrency.label: Concurrent downloads
settings.download_concurrency.hint: 3 recommended; single connection, too high may be rate-limited
settings.convert_concurrency.label: Concurrent conversions
settings.convert_concurrency.hint: 0 = auto (by CPU cores); conversion drives throughput
settings.sequential.label: Force sequential download
settings.sequential.hint: Turn on when the connection is unstable
settings.python_path.label: Python path (dev mode)
settings.python_path.hint: Leave blank to auto-detect; packaged build has it bundled
settings.work_dir.label: Work / output folder
settings.work_dir.hint: Folder for config.env and mahjong_logs output; packaged build defaults to the executable's folder — leave blank to use it
settings.locale.label: Interface language
env.title: Environment check
env.fail: Environment not ready; see hints below
env.chrome.missing: Chrome browser not found (required for ID collection)
env.tensoul.missing: tensoul-py-ng not found (please clone it first)
mode.title: Choose download method
mode.subtitle: Decide where to collect paipu IDs from
mode.crawler_mode.label: Collection mode
mode.auto.label: Leaderboard (auto)
mode.auto.desc: Grab top players by period and rank, then collect their games
mode.manual.label: Specific players
mode.manual.desc: Paste player page URLs to collect their games
mode.date_room.label: By date & room
mode.date_room.desc: Collect games of a room within a date range
mode.date_room_player.label: By date & room (per-player)
mode.date_room_player.desc: Visit every player's page for maximum coverage; supports resume
crawl.title: Collect paipu IDs
crawl.resumeHint: Previous progress detected; will resume automatically
crawl.autoDownload.hint: After IDs are collected, automatically run download + MJAI conversion — no need to start it manually
download.title: Download & convert
download.noInput: No IDs to download; finish the previous step or set a list in settings
log.title: Raw output (debug)
error.LOGIN_FAILED: Mahjong Soul login failed; check credentials (or error 151 needs a new resource version)
error.NO_PYTHON: Python not found; set the Python path in settings
error.SPAWN_FAILED: Failed to start the backend process
validation.dateRange: Start date cannot be later than end date
validation.dateFormat: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format
